inbox.title: Enhance Outlook Rooms Calendar for Managing Multiple Conference Rooms and Meeting Details
inbox.description:
Good morning,

I'm hoping someone can help me with a way to select rooms for meetings.  We have multiple conference rooms and multiple users (including our NCWorks team who are not CW employees).  I'm not sure if I am explaining this well, but we need a better way to manage the following spaces:


  *   Conference Room 1
  *   Conference Room 2
  *   Combined Conference Rooms 1 & 2 (there is a retractable wall and for larger meetings, we need to use both)
  *   NextGen Conference Room
  *   Team Room 2
  *   Team Room 3
  *   Charlotte Works Conference Room

If there is a way to add fields, we it would be helpful to add:

  *   Number of attendees
  *   Technology needs
  *   Other

We probably need to have a conversation to better explain this.  I am available today until 3:00.

Thanks!

Aly

Alyson M Ferko
Organizational Support Manager
8601 McAlpine Park Dr|Suite 130|Charlotte, NC  28211
704-206-1344 Direct
aferko@charlotteworks.com<mailto:aferko@charlotteworks.com> | www.charlotteworks.com<http://www.charlotteworks.com/>

[cid:image001.jpg@01DCA70C.60F705C0]

Our Mission: Leading the development of a skilled and in-demand workforce by engaging businesses, aligning community partners, empowering and connecting job seekers to meaningful employment, and fostering inclusive economic growth.

inbox.title: Ensure Email Delivery from Current and New Autodesk Forma Domains
inbox.description:
Please see email below. Can you please ensure that we continue to receive emails from the current domain and the new domain? More info is listed below.

Thanks!

Gretchen Hommrich Adams
PMC | Consulting Engineers<http://www.powermgmt.com/>
(615) 760-2621

From: David Sierra <dsierra@powermgmt.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 26, 2026 12:33 PM
To: Gretchen Hommrich <ghommrich@powermgmt.com>
Subject: Fw: Important: Autodesk Forma Email Notification Sender Update

I'm not sure if you or anyone else gets these emails.


Thanks,

-Dave



DAVID H. SIERRA, P.E.

Mechanical Engineer



PMC | Consulting Engineers

Direct: 615-760-2622

www.powermgmt.com<http://www.powermgmt.com/>



________________________________
From: Autodesk Construction Team <comms@acs.autodesk.com<mailto:comms@acs.autodesk.com>>
Sent: Thursday, February 26, 2026 11:09 AM
To: David Sierra <dsierra@powermgmt.com<mailto:dsierra@powermgmt.com>>
Subject: Important: Autodesk Forma Email Notification Sender Update


Dear Account Administrator,

Starting March 24, 2026, as part of the update from Autodesk Construction Cloud to Autodesk Forma, notification emails will transition to updated email sender domains (i.e. no-reply@mail.forma[.region].autodesk.com<mailto:no-reply@mail.forma[.region].autodesk.com>, etc.)

Action recommended:
To allow notification emails to continue to be delivered as expected, please:

  1.  Continue to maintain acc.autodesk.com on any existing allowlisting or safe-sender settings
  2.  Visit the Help content here<https://emconstruction.autodesk.com/n/NTcyLUpTVi03NzUAAAGgOeYFv1WUVdlkNNQYewjpxV-sA_isadcRsljtUEkdGuWc49dVxBYygluasHF_SxhXBV6NyAw=> for details and instructions about the Autodesk Forma email sender domain updates
  3.  Update any existing allowlisting or safe-sender settings to include your region-specific domains listed in the Help content

If your organization uses email security controls or quarantine workflows, you may wish to confirm delivery settings are aligned.

Please remind project members to review any personal inbox rules related to notification emails. Additionally, project teams can always update their in-product notification settings. Finally, no product URLs or links are currently changing.

Additional email notifications and in-product reminders over the next month will reinforce this update. If you have any questions, please use the in-product support chat.

Thank you,
Autodesk Forma

Autodesk
One Market Street, Suite 400, San Francisco, CA 94105
? Autodesk, Inc. All rights reserved
Unsubscribe<https://emconstruction.autodesk.com/NTcyLUpTVi03NzUAAAGgOeYFv8G0Wol_z2jHZmoI-GjvILnFdvpFEcd91MRY8aA-DqnOE-pgFpU7mUmhFzcC43rIEag=> | Privacy Policy<https://emconstruction.autodesk.com/NTcyLUpTVi03NzUAAAGgOeYFv-bhZwbzYLCDyHJxkmmMjzmYJC4cmQx8Azis12Vjny8vve0mjXIgn52JSeV0vvGDF5w=>

Caution
External Message
________________________________
